subcodes.first_line: O thou sorrowful one! Thy letters were received, and from the news of thy severe trials and griefs was profound sorrow obtained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محزون مکاتیب شما رسید و از اخبار شدت مشقات و اکدار شما نهایت تاثر حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
